raw_response_text:
<features>
- The flower has multiple petals, typically six or more.
- The petals are broad and somewhat rounded at the tips.
- The center of the flower has a prominent cluster of stamens.
- The color of the petals is a gradient, ranging from a darker pink/purple at the edges to a lighter shade towards the center.
- The leaves are green and appear to be somewhat lobed or divided.
</features>
<kb>
- IF a flower has multiple broad, rounded petals with a color gradient from dark to light towards the center, and a prominent stamen cluster, THEN the class is 81.
- IF a flower has three distinct, pointed petals and a yellow color, THEN the class is 14.
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image shows a flower with multiple broad, rounded petals that exhibit a color gradient from dark pink/purple to lighter shades towards the center. The center also has a prominent cluster of stamens. These features strongly match the description for class 81. The flower in the Target Image does not have three distinct, pointed petals or a yellow color, so it does not match class 14.
</rule_check>
<response>81</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- The flower has six petals.
- The petals are yellow.
- The flower has a distinct central structure with stamens.
- The petals are somewhat drooping or curved.
- There are dark lines or veins on some of the petals.
- The background is green and out of focus.
</features>
<kb>
- IF the flower has six petals, is yellow, and has dark lines on the petals, THEN the class is 14.
- IF the flower has six petals, is pink or purple, and has a star-like shape with a prominent central stamen cluster, THEN the class is 81.
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image shows a yellow flower with six petals. Some petals have dark lines or veins. This matches the description for class 14.
</rule_check>
<response>14</response>
